behavior_summary: This script implements the 'U8P_SKULCAND::look' (examine) handler for the skull candle item. When a player/actor inspects the item the script marks the item with an info/state (id 0x0208), applies a process-exclude step, and emits a short descriptive text 'skull candle ' to the viewer via Item::bark. The temporary string used for the bark is freed and the handler suspends/returns.
notable_control_flow: U8P_SKULCAND::look sets an info id (0x0208) on the item/process target before performing any output.
A process-exclude step runs after setting the info (likely to prevent further immediate processing or reentrancy for this process/object).
Item::bark is invoked to show the literal 'skull candle ' text to the examining process/player.
The temporary string is freed, the bark return value is observed/used in an implication/pop sequence, then the process suspends/returns.
open_questions: The exact semantic meaning of info id 0x0208 (what gameplay state it encodes) is not explicit and is inferred from usage.
Precise semantics of the 'process-exclude' step (what it excludes and for how long) are inferred but not confirmed.
Whether the BP+06h parameter is strictly the item instance 'this' or a process/player PID interacting with the item (or both) is inferred from calling pattern.

main_function.name: U8P_SKULCAND::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the in-game 'U8P_SKULCAND::look' (examine) event for the skull candle: set an item info/state, exclude the process from further immediate processing, and display the item's short description ('skull candle ') to the viewer.
entry_conditions: Triggered when an actor/player looks at or examines the skull candle item (Event 0 / U8P_SKULCAND::look).

external_calls.purpose: Annotate the target object with info id 0x0208 prior to output; likely marks a state such as 'has been examined'.
Exclude the current process/object from further immediate processing (likely to prevent reentrancy or duplicate handling).
Display the short description 'skull candle ' to the examining process/player.
Release the temporary string buffer previously allocated for the bark text.
End or pause the script's execution after performing the U8P_SKULCAND::look handling.
